systemStatus.headline: Mon May 11 4 AM run — Sling May 11 ✓ delivered (2 staff, 5.75 hrs, 0 OT). Toast May 10 DPS arrived but HTML-only — body not parseable via Gmail MCP. New 5★ from Deimos Somied (Google) overnight — top of reply queue. Google Ads: 2 reports in last 24h, no disapprovals. No Yelp / no TripAdvisor in 24h.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast Sun May 10 DPS arrived 7:39 AM PT — HTML-only again, snippet readable but body content not returned by Gmail MCP get_thread. Pattern now consistent: numbers not extractable. Manual check required for Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor%. (2) Sling May 11 ✓ delivered: 2 staff, 5.75 hrs total, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 0 off (light Monday). Rafael Patricio (Cook), Katharine Brown (Bartender). (3) New review: Deimos Somied left 5★ on Google May 10 — 'The margaritas were the best! Food was great too. But the margaritas!' Suggested reply ready. (4) Google Ads: 2 reports in last 24h (Daily Campaign + Campaign performance) — no disapproval or budget alerts visible in subjects. (5) Yelp: nothing in 24h. (6) TripAdvisor: no analytics email in 24h. (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK. (8) Review backlog grown to 6 unanswered — Lisa O'Brien now 30 days old, oldest in queue.
